input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.2.3
            TITLE: all critical fasteners must be secured from unintentional loosening with positive locking

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.2.3: All Critical Fasteners must be secured from unintentional loosening with Positive Locking
T.8.2.3 All Critical Fasteners must be secured from unintentional loosening with Positive Locking 
Mechanisms see T.8.3

final_answer: All Critical Fasteners must be secured from unintentional loosening with Positive Locking T.8.2.3 All Critical Fasteners must be secured from unintentional loosening with Positive Locking Mechanisms see T.8.3
